'''nofayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegecultural|vegecultural]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegecultural|vegecultural]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nofayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofayithi|nofayithi]] || [[word:nofayiji|nofayiji]] || [[word:nofayishi|nofayishi]] || [[word:nofayiki|nofayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofayuthuthu|nofayuthuthu]] || [[word:nofayujuju|nofayujuju]] || [[word:nofayushushu|nofayushushu]] || [[word:nofayukuku|nofayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofayuthu|nofayuthu]] || [[word:nofayuju|nofayuju]] || [[word:nofayushu|nofayushu]] || [[word:nofayuku|nofayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofayufthuf|nofayufthuf]] || [[word:nofayufjuf|nofayufjuf]] || [[word:nofayufshuf|nofayufshuf]] || [[word:nofayufkuf|nofayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofayethe|nofayethe]] || [[word:nofayeje|nofayeje]] || [[word:nofayeshe|nofayeshe]] || [[word:nofayeke|nofayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofayothotho|nofayothotho]] || [[word:nofayojojo|nofayojojo]] || [[word:nofayoshosho|nofayoshosho]] || [[word:nofayokoko|nofayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofayotho|nofayotho]] || [[word:nofayojo|nofayojo]] || [[word:nofayosho|nofayosho]] || [[word:nofayoko|nofayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofayofthof|nofayofthof]] || [[word:nofayofjof|nofayofjof]] || [[word:nofayofshof|nofayofshof]] || [[word:nofayofkof|nofayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofayïfthïf|nofayïfthïf]] || [[word:nofayïfjïf|nofayïfjïf]] || [[word:nofayïfshïf|nofayïfshïf]] || [[word:nofayïfkïf|nofayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofayïfthïfthïf|nofayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:nofayïfjïfjïf|nofayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:nofayïfshïfshïf|nofayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:nofayïfkïfkïf|nofayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofayïfthïf|nofayïfthïf]] || [[word:nofayïfjïf|nofayïfjïf]] || [[word:nofayïfshïf|nofayïfshïf]] || [[word:nofayïfkïf|nofayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofayïfthïf|nofayïfthïf]] || [[word:nofayïfjïf|nofayïfjïf]] || [[word:nofayïfshïf|nofayïfshïf]] || [[word:nofayïfkïf|nofayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofayæthæ|nofayæthæ]] || [[word:nofayæjæ|nofayæjæ]] || [[word:nofayæshæ|nofayæshæ]] || [[word:nofayækæ|nofayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofayathatha|nofayathatha]] || [[word:nofayajaja|nofayajaja]] || [[word:nofayashasha|nofayashasha]] || [[word:nofayakaka|nofayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofayatha|nofayatha]] || [[word:nofayaja|nofayaja]] || [[word:nofayasha|nofayasha]] || [[word:nofayaka|nofayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofayafthaf|nofayafthaf]] || [[word:nofayafjaf|nofayafjaf]] || [[word:nofayafshaf|nofayafshaf]] || [[word:nofayafkaf|nofayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nofayasha|nofayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofayshësha|nofayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofayrosha|nofayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofaymusha|nofaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofayasha|nofayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofaynkshësha|gonofaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofaynkrosha|gonofaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofaynkmusha|gonofaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofaynkyasha|gonofaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nofafayasha|nofafayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofafayshësha|nofafayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofafayrosha|nofafayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofafaymusha|nofafaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofafayasha|nofafayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofafaynkshësha|gonofafaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofafaynkrosha|gonofafaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofafaynkmusha|gonofafaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofafaynkyasha|gonofafaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nefæyasha|nefæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nefæyshësha|nefæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nefæyrosha|nefæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nefæymusha|nefæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nefæyasha|nefæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonefæynkshësha|gonefæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonefæynkrosha|gonefæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonefæynkmusha|gonefæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonefæynkyasha|gonefæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nofayasha|nofayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofayshësha|nofayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofayrosha|nofayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofaymusha|nofaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofayasha|nofayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofaynkshësha|gonofaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofaynkrosha|gonofaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofaynkmusha|gonofaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofaynkyasha|gonofaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
